description_long: This handbag features a tall, rounded trapezoidal body with a wide opening at the top and a gently tapering base. The exterior is adorned with a striking geometric pattern in black and deep pink, forming interlocking loops and dots across the surface. Two tan leather handles are attached to the upper sides, arching gracefully for easy carrying by hand or over the forearm. The bag's structure appears semi-rigid, maintaining its shape while offering some flexibility. The top opening is bordered in black, suggesting a possible closure mechanism, though it is not clearly visible. The overall design is both modern and elegant, suitable for urban environments and daily use.
description: A tall, semi-rigid handbag with tan leather handles and a bold black and pink geometric pattern, featuring a wide top opening and a structured silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full geometric pattern, both tan handles, and the wide top opening.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's narrow profile and the way the handles attach to the upper edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, displaying the same pattern and handle arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and handle attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Two fixed, medium-length tan leather handles, suitable for hand or forearm carrying, attached at the upper sides.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Closure mechanism not clearly visible; likely a zipper or magnetic snap at the top opening.
attribute_pattern: Black and pink geometric pattern with interlocking loops and dots.
